description: Trades the gap between implied and realized volatility. When IV is rich vs RV sell premium; when IV is cheap buy premium.
Classifies positive/negative gamma regimes from dealer positioning. Adapts strategy behavior based on whether dealers are long or short gamma.
Trades mispricings across strike and tenor on the vol surface. Buys cheap wings and sells rich wings relative to surface fair value.
Exploits differences between index option pricing and single-name option pricing around implied correlation.
Systematically prices expected moves around earnings and catalysts. Buys or sells vol depending on whether events are over- or under-priced.
Harvests roll yield from contango in VIX or equity vol term structure with strict risk controls.
Identifies gamma pinning at high open interest strikes and trades around 0DTE hedging dynamics.
Systematically sells options premium with strict filters: only when IV>RV is positive regime is not crisis and skew is not extreme.
Combines equity vol credit spreads rate vol and macro signals into regime labels that filter all other strategies.
Current Enso baseline. S/R pivot trading with confluence scoring. Adding vol filters improves signal quality.
